title: BetterBowEnv
description: a simple lightweight mod that improves the minecraft environment for arrows and bow PvP/PvE
body:
a simple lightweight mod that improves the minecraft environment for arrows and bow PvP/PvE.

it modifies certain game mechanics and allows features such as - 

- arrows to pass through leaves & snow 
- arrows can breaks glass and ice
- arrows with flame melt ice instead of breaking it
- flame arrows can burn leaves and start fires
- arrows can bounce off certain blocks slime
- removes annoying and glitchy projectile trails
- arrows slide off honey blocks
- removed annoying arrow trail

None of these features are intended to work with dispensers. This is so that none of the existing farms/redstone contraptions break.

DONT USE THIS ON ANY PvP servers... this WILL get you banned. 
this mod is only for improving the experience in private survival servers or PvE.
i agree this mod is amazing and every bow duels sever should use it but it can be considered hacking :(

there are plans on making all these features customizable in modmenu
